entries.title: Architecture & Space
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Interior, exterior, city, map, and spatial concept visuals.

Define viewpoint, scale, material, lighting, and spatial function.
For maps, specify landmarks, labels, border decoration, and visual accuracy level.
Avoid impossible perspectives unless the output is conceptual.
Lock map label language and relative placement.
entries.description: Interior, exterior, city, map, and spatial concept visuals.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的其他条目《Architecture & Space》。 关键词：Architecture、Interior、Travel、Commerce。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。

entries.title: Illustration & Art Style
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Anime, watercolor, ink, material experiments, and art direction.

Define composition, subject, palette, brush material, mood, and rendering depth.
For reference images, state what must be preserved.
Avoid style-only prompts without composition.
Lock character identity when using references.
entries.description: Anime, watercolor, ink, material experiments, and art direction.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的其他条目《Illustration & Art Style》。 关键词：Illustration、Art、Story、Creative。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。

entries.title: History & Classical Themes
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Dynasty clothing, scroll narrative, poetry, and traditional motifs.

Specify dynasty, clothing system, object references, layout format, and cultural mood.
Use scroll, album page, or poster format deliberately.
Avoid mixing dynasties when historical accuracy matters.
Constrain random modern props.
entries.description: Dynasty clothing, scroll narrative, poetry, and traditional motifs.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的其他条目《History & Classical Themes》。 关键词：History、Classical、History、Story。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。

entries.title: Concept Product Breakdown
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
R&D boards, exploded views, mixed tasks, and special outputs.

Define the artifact type, components, labels, material logic, and final presentation format.
Use clear callouts and a controlled technical style.
Avoid unspecified mixed tasks.
Keep labels short and component relationships visible.
entries.description: R&D boards, exploded views, mixed tasks, and special outputs.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的其他条目《Concept Product Breakdown》。 关键词：Other Use Cases、Product、Creative、Tech。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
